name: Cashew Chili
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Cider vinegar (this is much more than needed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté onions, bell peppers, celery, and garlic until softened.
2. Add spices and continue to fry with the onion mixture, stirring constantly.
3. Stir in tomatoes, pepper, bay leaf, cashews, salt, and raisins.
4. Add beans and simmer covered for 30 minutes. If necessary, add water to reach desired consistency.
5. Add vinegar when the chili is almost ready. For variety, you may also include carrots or green beans, which may require cooking longer until they are tender.
